name: KOUMAC (NLLE-CALEDO
citation: Menne et al. 2012, J. Atmos. Oceanic Tech. 29, 897-910; dataset DOI 10.7289/V5D21VHZ
note: Largest single-day PRCP in NOAA's global station network. Station data only (not a complete gridded Earth sample). Rows with non-empty Q-FLAG and -9999 sentinels excluded. Single-day PRCP only (multiday MDPR totals excluded).
